issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, only the happy path.

scenarios.name: scan-ts-project-complexity
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits the explicit exclusion of generated code, while Response B lacks tiers, refactoring suggestions, and threshold details.

scenarios.name: analyze-django-complexity
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B does not provide any analysis.
